case_for: Adams has cleared 12.0 points in five of his last six games, including a hot stretch of 17.6, 25.9, and 42.8 in his three most recent outings, and the pregame projection of 42.8 points reflects strong current usage.
case_against: His week 10 dud of 9.1 points shows he can fall short of the threshold if targets dry up or game script turns unfavorable.
